reports.incident_description: OPD token display is out of sync with HIS; looks like the display controller time is drifting and calls wrong ticket order.
HIS sessions in ETU drop every few minutes since the light rain; link to the ETU switch is intermittently unreachable, slowing triage.
PACS cannot retrieve prior CT studies; DICOM C-FIND works but C-MOVE fails from archive before the evening list.
Dispensing label printers in OPD pharmacy are offline after a power cycle; PCs reach HIS but printers look on the wrong VLAN.
LIS to HIS result posting stalled since 05:50; HL7 messages stuck in the outbound queue and wards aren't seeing morning labs.
Link to the peripheral clinic dropped during the short rain; rooftop wireless backhaul is flapping and consult was aborted.
OT scheduling module shows a duplicate slot for Theatre 2 at 5 pm after rescheduling; risk of double-booking.
Card payment gateway in HIS is timing out; receipts remain pending while tokens settle later; please check firewall and callbacks.
Unable to assign the standard MO role during onboarding; the role template is missing after the last HIS update.
Bed transfers done at 08:30 are not visible; ADT feed is delayed and BHT location still shows the old ward.
Humidity alarm in the server room after the brief evening rain; backup CRAC did not auto-start and sensors need checking.
Barcode scanners at NICU med cabinet fail to read new wristbands; yesterday’s driver push seems incompatible.
Nightly database backup failed two nights; offsite replication lag is 9 hours and needs immediate DR review.
Maternity block NVR is at 98% and not enforcing the 14-day retention after firmware patch; risk of recording halt.
Bedside monitors lost network to central station twice during the morning rain; PoE switch shows power issues.
After the noon patch, HIS is issuing duplicate receipt numbers in OPD; finance tallies are off and need a hotfix.
PACS viewer lags 20–30 seconds when scrolling MR series; local cache bypassed and Radiology VLAN QoS seems low.
Crossmatch label timestamps are 10 minutes ahead of LIS; the workstation is not syncing with NTP, affecting traceability.
IP phone in OT 2 is not registering; anaesthesia calls fail and the voice VLAN DHCP scope may be exhausted.
Rehab module access removed after role cleanup; therapists cannot document sessions and need permission mapping.
OPD token displays flicker and reboot during the afternoon light rain; the UPS is beeping and the switch keeps restarting.
High CRC errors and flapping on the fibre uplink to Ward 8E after rain; SFP shows increased optical loss and needs splice checks.
Diet order interface shows permission denied for two staff after HR roster change; likely AD group sync issue.
Audit found three terminated locum accounts still active in HIS with eRx rights; please deactivate and run an access review.
Cannot log in to e-prescribe on the tablet over hospital Wi-Fi; 2FA push not arriving and SMS gateway seems queued.
Barcode wristband printer at Counter 2 not printing; HIS registration shows 'spooler paused' and patients are queueing.
PACS viewer on CT console intermittently freezes when loading large series; DICOM association timeouts on VLAN Rad-02.
Dispensing in HIS deducts stock locally but Inventory module not updating; negative balance alerts for amoxicillin since 08:30.
Biometric attendance terminal at Staff Gate 1 shows 'offline'; punches not syncing to HRM, likely switch port flapping in guard room.
HIS OR scheduling duplicated two lists after last patch; anaesthesia and theatre teams getting conflicting times.
Bedside monitors exporting vitals to HIS under wrong cot numbers; ADT/bed mapping seems altered after weekend merge.
After light rain, ward Wi‑Fi drops every few minutes; VoIP calls cut and HIS sessions log out—outdoor AP uplink may be wet.
LIS-to-EHR results queue stuck (>180 messages); critical K+ results not posting to wards.
Cashier role now exposes Psychiatry encounter notes via Billing screen; urgent role/permission correction needed.
Triage tablets reject logins with 'license seats exceeded' after adding new MOs; need license pool adjustment.
Server room temperature alarms during very warm afternoon; core switches reporting 58°C—please check CRAC and load.
Brief power dip during thundery rain—PACS archive failover misbehaved; new studies stuck in incoming queue.
e‑Prescription 2FA SMS OTPs timing out; unable to sign from clinic—OTP gateway or route issue.
After last night’s HIS update, MAR 'Acknowledge' button is greyed; drug rounds delayed.
Phishing email about EPF update received by many staff; two entered credentials—please enforce resets and review mail logs.
Scanning stations cannot upload PDFs to eMR; SFTP host unreachable since morning light rain.
HL7 feed to external reference lab failing TLS handshake; certificate expired today and samples are queued.
QMS kiosks stuck on Windows update splash; OPD queues building—need quick rollback or completion.
ICU PACS workstations can’t play echo loops; MPEG-2 codec missing after auto-update.
Barcode label printer producing faint codes that scanners reject; driver shows wrong media settings post-update.
e‑OPD login locked after surname change; AD synced name but old username persists—access needed for evening clinic.
Nightly EHR DB differential backup failed—storage at 95% and DR RPO at risk before OPD starts.
HIS very slow in Maternity; fiber uplink shows packet loss—midday heat may be affecting cabinet; clinic e-registrations halted.
After brief rain and gusty wind, rooftop microwave link to Divisional Hospital is down; evening teleclinic cancelled—please failover to 4G.
During UAT of Inventory update, PO numbers are duplicating across suppliers; request hold on release and fix numbering rules.
OPD registration keeps timing out; NIC lookup via HIS API fails and tokens don’t print. Front-desk Wi-Fi drops in the heat.
CT console shows empty PACS worklist; HL7 ADT feed appears delayed. Please restart interface services.
EHR in ETU froze mid-triage; vitals and allergy fields won’t save after the thunder. Suspect database lock or replication lag.
Inpatient Pharmacy barcode scanner reads but item codes not mapping post last night’s patch; Inventory posting fails and queue grows.
Two new interns cannot order pre-op labs in CPOE; role profiles missing for Ward 7. Please provision urgently.
LIS interface stopped receiving CBC orders around the noon thunder; analyser idle; HIS-LIS channel shows ‘down’ in gateway.
Basement corridor Wi-Fi keeps resetting; ceiling AP near oxygen plant cabinet loops. Need switch inspection.
Zebra label printer off the network; patient wristbands not printing; possible DHCP conflict since 05:00. Request fixed IP.
Archive viewer shows certificate expired when opening last year’s discharge summaries on ward round. Kindly renew and deploy.
OPD billing stalls at payment capture; callback not posting to HIS; duplicate tokens visible. Please trace payment gateway logs.
Biometric attendance devices not syncing since yesterday; HRM not receiving logs. Payroll cutoff this week.
Theatre 2 PACS viewer blank; viewer plugin disabled after browser security policy change. Need exception to view pre-op echo.
MRD cannot generate ICD coding reports; report server timing out; outpatient clinic backlog forming.
Evening rain triggered moisture alarm in Gate 1 cabinet; CCTV NVR offline and streams unavailable. Need PoE switch check and drying.
Ultrasound images intermittently fail to push to PACS; high latency on Radiology VLAN around lunch; equipment room AC struggling with heat.
Bedside monitors stopped charting to HIS; interface engine service halted after morning thunder surge. Dialysis rounds affected.
Theatre scheduling duplicated tomorrow’s lists after sync; surgeons see conflicting allocations on the mobile app. Please de-duplicate and lock.
Cannot log into e-Prescribe; OTP SMS not arriving to multiple MOs. Suspect SMS gateway or firewall block.
Bed board not updating discharges; ADT queue stuck since 13:40 after brief rain. Porters waiting for beds.
ICU ventilator HL7 ORU messages rejected by HIS; device certificate not trusted and field mapping missing. Need whitelist and mapping.
Diet order module crashes when adding ‘lactose-free’ custom tag; app closes and orders are lost before lunch run.
After light morning rain, Pharmacy Bay 2 POS printer disconnects; switch port flaps and bills keep reprinting.
Antibiotic stewardship dashboard is stale; ETL to the data warehouse failed since Sunday. Review meeting tomorrow.
Shared drive with audit files accessible to All_Staff; permissions misapplied during folder migration. Immediate PDPA compliance risk.
During mass-casualty drill in the car park, triage tablets lost HIS access; captive portal reappeared. Need emergency SSID with MAC bypass.
New CT scanner's modality worklist not pulling from HIS; CT protocols appear as 'Unknown'. PACS/HIS mapping likely missing since yesterday's install.
OPD token display frozen at counter 3; queue module not receiving updates though tokens being issued. Crowd getting restless.
During thunder and lightning, bedside PCs keep disconnecting; eIMR autosave failed twice; network switch may be rebooting on its own.
ePharmacy cannot fetch item balances from Inventory; purchase orders stuck in 'pending interface'. Suspect HIS-Inventory link down.
After heavy rain and gusts, MDF room shows blinking red on fiber panel; several wards lost phone and LAN. Need IT to check core switch and fiber.
Thunderstorm caused LIS connection drop; analyzer results duplicated in HIS for 7 patients; need de-dup and reprocess HL7 queue.
Echo machine images not reaching PACS; DICOM send fails with AE title not recognized after last update.
New MO batch joined OPD; need HIS accounts with OPD prescribing rights by noon. Two transferred MOs require role changes.
PACS viewer in OT-2 won't load today's CT angiogram; DICOM service times out; case waiting on table.
Gatehouse VoIP phones and intercom offline after evening lightning; NMS shows switch unreachable. Please restore comms.
Billing module double-charged a few receipts when payment gateway hung; need reversal and check timeout settings.
e-Prescribing blocked for me on Ward 10; system says 'insufficient privileges' since last patch. Please correct role.
Pathology file server shows 'read-only' and high humidity alert; staff can't save histology images. Rain all morning.
Bedside monitors not pushing vitals to HIS; VLAN 30 devices showing red on switch after power dips in rain.
Casualty walk-ins created duplicate MRNs due to merge tool error; request de-dup and audit trail review.
Claims export (OPD + inward) throws 500 error after yesterday's patch; cannot submit to insurer portal.
LIS results (ABG, electrolytes) not arriving in ICU dashboard; interface queue stuck; patient on ventilator needs labs now.
Wristband barcode printer offline; HIS shows device unreachable; wall jack damp after downpour.
NICU ventilator data feed to HIS intermittently drops since lightning; switch port shows errors; need port swap/VLAN check.
Diet orders from wards not syncing to kitchen screen; message broker seems down; meals going out late.
Speech-to-text dictation profile missing; roaming profile server not loading; cannot sign off CT list.
VPN to Divisional Clinic - Kesbewa down; field team cannot upload immunization data; local ISP says link ok.
Server room temp spiked; AC-2 failed after storm; core blades throttling alarms seen; request failover to DR rack until cooling restored.
Drug issues not decrementing stock; ePharmacy-Inventory sync backlog; DB index lock suspected since noon.
After HIS UI change, ward staff confused with new discharge workflow; request quick refresher and cheat sheet today.
During the afternoon thunderstorm the ward network switch kept rebooting; eMAR on the bedside tablets dropped connections. Please stabilise power to the switch and check logs.
After multiple surges in the downpour, the data centre UPS went to bypass; core HIS hosts are running unprotected. Request immediate IT verification and safe shutdown plan if needed.
OPD token display boards are not pulling numbers from HIS though registration is active; suspect API link from queue server is dropped. Please reset the service.
Water seepage near the ETU ground-floor rack; the fiber SFP shows errors and link to Radiology drops intermittently. Need IT to isolate the port and fail over.
PACS viewer in Theatre times out when opening CT; images take minutes during the flooding. Please check bandwidth/QoS between Theatre and PACS.
SMS results gateway shows a >200 message backlog; vendor endpoint unreachable and 4G backup is saturated due to storm. Kindly reroute or throttle noncritical traffic.
Multiple staff cannot log in to HIS after a brief power dip; OPD cannot reach the domain controller from our subnet. Need IT to restore AD connectivity.
Pharmacy label printers stopped receiving jobs; print server service appears down after morning restart. Please restart the spooler and clear the stuck queue.
VPN to the teleradiology vendor is down; CT studies await reporting and can’t be pushed. Likely ISP/weather-related—kindly fail over to secondary tunnel.
LIS-HIS orders interface is queuing; HL7 ACKs are delayed and phlebotomy labels print 10–15 mins late. Please drain the queue and check the interface engine.
Server room humidity alarm triggered in the wet heat; request IT to verify sensors and protect storage arrays until HVAC stabilises.
Ward Wi‑Fi is down; bedside monitors won’t sync vitals to EHR and AP LEDs are off. Suspect PoE switch fault—please attend.
VoIP phones in ETU are dead during triage; the PoE core shows amber status. We can’t call Lab or Radiology—need urgent IT intervention.
HIS billing module hangs on 'posting'; cashier counters piling up since morning rain. Please check DB locks and roll back any faulty patch.
Discharge eBHT PDFs scan but won’t upload; MRD share is unreachable from records PCs. Kindly restore the file server path and permissions.
My clinic note templates vanished after a role update; account shows only OPD forms. Please reinstate the Consultant profile before the afternoon clinic.
Last night’s full DB backup failed with a tape picker error; no verified offsite copy. Request immediate retry and hardware check.
Self-service token kiosks are responsive but cannot fetch queue numbers; HIS gateway returns 500. Please restart the gateway service.
Ultrasound modality worklist is empty; DICOM MWM service not reachable on Radiology VLAN post-storm. Need IT to restore the AE connectivity.
Block B core switch is flapping since the squall; users lose HIS access every few minutes. Request priority stabilisation and link diagnostics.
Biometric attendance units are not syncing to HIS; staff hours missing. Suspect expired API certificate—please renew and push data.
Two-factor OTPs via SMS are delayed 5–8 minutes; can’t access e-prescribing during ward round. Kindly check the OTP gateway route and throttle noncritical SMS.
Power surge during thunderstorm knocked an imaging storage node; PACS returns write failures and studies queue on modalities. Need urgent storage failover.
EDR shows duplicate drug items after formulary update; barcode scan picks wrong strength. Please roll back mapping and correct item codes.
Inter-hospital MPLS link is unstable in the prolonged rain; teleconsult sessions drop with jitter >30%. Request traffic shaping and ISP escalation.
OPD token module freezes when assigning numbers; error 'OPD-API unreachable' after the morning downpour and brief power flicker. Queues are backing up.
PACS not pushing CXR to EHR; DICOM send shows 'association rejected' since the evening thunderburst. Patients waiting for reports.
Billing module throwing duplicate invoice error; charge master not syncing after yesterday’s patch. Need rollback or hotfix before OPD close.
LIS–Hematology interface dropping HL7 messages during the thunder spell; results not posting to wards/EHR. Please stabilize and replay the queue.
Medication barcode printers show 'network path not found'; corridor switch likely down after heavy rain, and labels are damp/curling.
OR scheduling board intermittently blank; 'WebSocket disconnected from HIS' on two theatre PCs. Elective list at risk.
ePrescribing hung during lightning; notes on two inpatients unsaved. Need data recovery and autosave enabled hospital‑wide.
ePharmacy cannot sync stock with Inventory; API timeouts and negative stock alerts after afternoon storm. Dispensing delayed.
Doctor portal password resets failing; 'LDAP bind failed' on the IAM tool. Suspect domain controller connectivity.
Self‑registration/triage kiosks not printing wristbands; HIS label service down post‑morning downpour. ETU crowding.
OPD lobby IP cameras offline; access switch cycling with amber LEDs in the windy, humid evening. Check network and PoE budget.
Ward diet orders not reaching the kitchen module; message queue stuck at 1,254 pending. Possibly after last HIS update.
Payment gateway in Billing returns 502 via firewall; card payments intermittently fail after coastal winds/rain. Review outbound rules and SSL pinning.
LIS user roles reset; cannot verify/release results. Started after thunder and a brief outage; need role map restore.
Handheld vitals tablets dropping Wi‑Fi; readings not syncing to EHR. Began after the afternoon storm—AP may have water ingress.
Last night’s database backup to DR failed; VPN tunnel to offsite flapped during heavy rain. Please rerun and confirm integrity.
Appointment module double‑booked slots; server time drifted, NTP unsynced after power events. Need immediate time sync.
Document scanners fail to upload PDFs—shared drive quota full; OPD files stuck in staging. Request archiving and quota increase.
Antibiotic stewardship dashboard shows stale data; ETL job not running since Sunday. Kindly restart job and reschedule.
PACS viewer freezing for CT over VPN; latency spikes since the morning heavy rain. Review core switch and QoS for imaging VLAN.
Dialysis chairside charting app not fetching labs; HL7 interface down post‑thunder. Dialysis rounds delayed.
GRN posting hangs; Finance interface times out—possible DB lock. Began after the noon rain band; need vendor escalation.
SMS reminders not sending; SMPP credentials expired per logs. Patients arriving without confirmations.
Server room humidity at 71% after coastal downpour; two TOR switches show CRC errors. Please inspect fiber and adjust HVAC alarms.
E‑sign pad not recognized on pre‑op PC after Windows update; driver missing. Need rollback before the noon theatre list.
Two OPD counters show 'Session expired' every 3-4 minutes after HIS login; patient tokens not printing.
Ward Wi-Fi down; eMAR tablets not syncing meds after thunder and heavy rain. Manual charting started.
CT images not linking to EHR; PACS interface shows HL7 ACK timeouts. Radiologist cannot finalize reports.
OT scheduling module not pulling today's theatre list; anaesthesia notes exist but not visible to surgeons.
OPD entrance token kiosk shows 'Network unreachable'; rainwater seen near floor box. Crowd building.
ABG analyser results not posting to HIS via LIS; sample IDs pending since 15:05. Nurses copying by hand.
VoIP extensions across admin block dropped during storm; PBX registrations cycling. Need network check.
Billing module throws 'permission denied' for waiver approvals since last role update.
Pharmacy label printers print garbled Sinhala from eRx; encoding/driver mismatch after small update.
HR biometric attendance devices not syncing to HIS HRM since morning; today's punches missing.
On-call VPN token expired; cannot access PACS from home for CT reads. Please reset immediately.
Server room AC alarm—humidity high; storage shows 'condensation risk on bay 3'. Rain with thunder outside.
LIS-HIS interface queue stuck since 14:10; FBC/LFT not reaching wards; analyser end OK.
Pre-op checklist in Theatre module spins on 'saving' in OR2 only; other ORs OK. Suspect workstation profile.
CCTV feeds for Block B black at command room; NVR reachable but 'no stream'. Water seepage near access switch.
Barcode med scanning intermittently failing—HIS says 'device not trusted' after last patch.
Image routing to home workstation failing; site-to-site VPN unstable; studies stuck in 'sent'. Night calls affected.
Month-end backup shows 'completed with warnings'; offsite object store not receiving billing DB snapshot.
Self-service kiosk accepts cash but no token issued; HIS interface service down since 07:15.
eMR patient search very slow (>30s) across MRD; started after weekend archive. Kindly reindex.
New HO account cannot view past discharge summaries for Surgical Team A; role mapping missing.
Inventory module not syncing GRNs from supplier portal; API returns 500; CSSD stocks not updating.
ETU triage dashboard creating duplicates when scanning NIC; dedup matching service may be off.
After generator switchover, core network reconverged; several VLANs dropped—wards lost HIS ~6 mins.
Ward round tablets stuck on 'synchronizing records'; only work on 4G hotspot. Internal Wi-Fi routing issue?
HIS logs out every ~5 mins on Ward 3 desktops; session timeout seems misconfigured after last patch; medication charts keep closing.
PACS viewer in OPD shows blank study panes on Chrome since morning; Edge works; likely plugin/codec issue after update.
OPD token displays freeze and not pulling queue from HIS after brief thunder; surge may have tripped the controller.
Biometric attendance punches not syncing to HR module since 06:00; night duty records missing; please reprocess logs.
Ward 7 Wi‑Fi drops every few minutes; vitals upload from pumps to HIS failing; signal weak on the east side.
During heavy rain the radiology VLAN shows 20–30% packet loss; CT images queueing and PACS transfers timing out.
VPN to Regional Blood Bank unstable; crossmatch results not posting to LIMS; using phone updates as workaround.
After HIS minor update, 'Pharmacy Technician' role blocked from Issue screen with 'insufficient permission'; dispensing halted.
Dictation microphones not detected after Windows update; speech-recognition driver missing; report turnaround delayed.
UPS in server room beeping after rain; power fluctuation; HIS database latency spiking; request immediate failover check.
Card payments intermittently failing with gateway timeout; possible TLS/certificate issue; long patient queue building.
Self-service password reset shows 'token generation failed'; many staff unable to log in during shift change.
No SMS appointment reminders sent today; vendor API returning 401; please renew the key and replay the batch.
Storm caused seepage into old network closet; fiber patch panel damp, link amber; OPD PCs dropping HIS intermittently.
OT list not syncing from consultants’ calendar to HIS; duplicate slots and wrong theatre numbers visible.
Analyzer interface sending duplicate HL7 results since noon; clinicians getting double reports; need de-dup and ACK fix.
Barcode labels from ward printer smudge and won’t scan at Pharmacy; humidity curling paper; please calibrate and replace media.
Spoofed 'HIS Admin' phishing email received by staff; at least 6 clicked; request forced password reset, MFA review, endpoint scans.
VoIP phones in Block B are down; PoE switch appears to be in a reboot loop after morning rain; registration lines affected.
PACS DICOM listener service stopped; image queue backlogged; please restart service and clear stuck jobs.
Inventory module cannot post GRN; 'GL interface failed' error; month-end supplier invoices pending.
NICU monitors intermittently not pushing vitals to EMR over Wi‑Fi; probable channel congestion; need site survey and QoS.
Internet very slow; telemedicine consults breaking; firewall shows many inbound probes; request ISP check and rate-limiting.
Nightly HIS database backup failed two nights; storage repository at 95%; need cleanup and confirm restore integrity.
Discharge summaries not printing; print server queue stuck; spooler restart helps only briefly.
OPD Registration won’t pull NIC validation; screen shows 'Auth failed'. Counters cannot generate visit IDs; please reauthorize the external service.
Pharmacy barcode label printer started printing gibberish after the morning Windows update. Suspect driver rollback; need correct driver and test print via HIS.
Radiology orders from EHR are queued and not reaching RIS/PACS. HL7 interface shows stuck messages since 10:30.
After the evening rain, Dental OPD lost network; fiber media converter shows LOS. Clinics cannot access HIS.
New intern batch not provisioned in AD/HIS. They cannot log in to order labs or write notes.
Theatre list is not syncing to the Anaesthesia pre-op module. We are seeing duplicate bookings on two screens.
Brief lightning dip triggered DB failover; Billing went read-only. Please confirm data integrity and complete failback.
ETU VoIP phones are down; PoE switch keeps rebooting after the rain. Triage is using mobiles—urgent fix.
Staff received an email about a 'billing patch' with a login link. Two cashiers clicked—request forced password reset and mailbox scan.
During the thunderstorm, CT images are not pushing to PACS. DICOM association timeouts; backlog growing.
OR camera feed to the lecture hall is blank. Looks like multicast blocked by a new firewall rule.
Ward 7C Wi‑Fi keeps dropping since the afternoon showers. eMAR won’t load; corridor AP shows red light.
LIS archive to the storage share failed two nights in a row. Analyzer storage is near full—please clear space and fix the job.
Renal clinic VPN to base hospital is unstable midday. Dialysis data sync to HIS fails intermittently.
After morning thunder, several switch ports seem dead; bedside vitals PCs are offline. Need immediate port reassign/switch check.
Heavy rain coincided with rising server room humidity; UPS alarmed twice. Request dehumidification and sensor check to prevent shutdown.
Inventory module freezes when posting GRN. Users get 'record locked' and can’t complete receipts.
SSO to HR/Payroll fails—'token signature invalid'. Suspect expired federation cert; payroll run due tonight.
OPD token display TVs keep going offline after the thundery spell. Media players cannot reach the signage server.
EHR orders with Sinhala test names aren’t reaching LIS. Interface engine shows character encoding error; channel stopped.
HIS is very sluggish; labs open late. DBA dashboard shows replica lag >25 minutes since the evening power dips.
PACS gateway in CT room drops DICOM sessions during heavy rain. LAN point near gantry feels damp; images are queuing.
Nightly backup verification reports checksum mismatch on the NAS. Started after multiple power blips—request disk health and restore test.
EDR blocked suspected ransomware on a Radiology workstation after a macro-enabled file. Machine isolated; need forensics and reimage.
Cannot access Operative Notes module; role not mapped. Theatre list prep is delayed.
PACS viewer on all reporting stations goes black after login; started soon after evening lightning. DICOM router not reachable from VLAN-RAD.
Bedside monitors intermittently lose HIS connectivity; drug orders not pulling. Suspect network switch near ICU ceiling damp from storm.
OPD queue TV reboots every few minutes during heavy rain; HDMI-over-LAN extenders dropping link on the OPD floor switch.
Server room alarm shows high humidity and temperature; core HIS host throttling and session lag across wards this hot afternoon.
After morning Windows updates, pharmacy barcode scanners are not detected by HIS dispensing; unable to post issues to stock.
Severe storm caused power dip; LIS rack UPS beeping and analyser results are not crossing to HIS (over 20 min delay).
Multiple staff locked out of HIS after new password policy; counters idle and token queue piling up.
My account created but lacks order-entry and theatre booking rights in HIS; list for morning OT pending.
Agrahara insurance e-claim submission from Billing module times out repeatedly in today’s rain; payment queue held.
During thunder, SLT fibre to X-ray complex keeps dropping; PACS sync and teleconsult go offline.
Ward Wi-Fi (MedNet) disconnects every 15 mins; vitals and intake charts not uploading to HIS.
eChanneling bookings not writing back to HIS; duplicate MRNs being created at registration this morning.
Water seepage from today’s persistent rain reached the records network rack; access switch ports amber and clinics offline.
Nightly HIS database backup failed checksum; backup job reports corruption, last verified backup is D-2.
Sample label printer queue stuck; new barcodes not spooling to Zebra; OPD blood collection stalled.
Patient portal TLS certificate expiring; browsers warn when sharing lab links with patients during clinic.
Post-storm lightning: OT PoE phones and nurse call console offline; PoE switch in OT rack likely tripped.
Speech-to-text dictation in PACS says license expired; forced to type reports, slowing CT list.
SMS gateway for releasing lab results not reachable after evening thunder; patients not receiving OTPs.
Several counters show 'domain not available'; logins fail until reboot. Suspect AD/LDAP unreachable after brief outage.
Squally rain caused OPD network closet to reboot; triage tablets and queue displays offline.
Multiple staff received spoofed 'Health Ministry' email; a few clicked links on hospital PCs. Request immediate phishing containment.
CT modality worklist empty since morning HIS patch; techs entering IDs manually, risk of mis-tagging.
After today’s squall, replication lag between primary HIS DB and DR site exceeds 45 minutes; failover RPO not met.
Medication chart in HIS keeps spinning; query slow since last patch and morning round delayed.
After last night’s HIS patch, OPD logins loop back to the sign-in screen and token printers won’t pull queue numbers.
CT console shows DICOM send failures; PACS SCP is unreachable since the afternoon thunderstorm, so studies aren’t routing.
Medication barcode scanners can’t join the ward Wi‑Fi; AP signal is weak after roof leaks from today’s rain.
HIS dispensing isn’t deducting stock from the correct batch; inventory shows negative balance since 10:30 AM.
OR scheduling module returns HTTP 500 and the theatre list won’t print; morning sessions are held up.
Bedside monitors stopped updating in HIS; VLAN to NICU is flapping and the corridor UPS is beeping after steady rain.
New biochemistry analyzer isn’t sending results to LIS; ASTM/TCP handshake errors suggest interface configuration or cert issue.
PACS viewer times out for urgent chest CT; hospital network latency is high during the squally rain.
Ambulance bay CCTV feeds are down; NVR shows offline and the PoE switch in the guard room may have water ingress.
HR module attendance export stalls at 92% and fails; need DB job check and a rerun before payroll cut‑off.
Backup job ‘HIS‑Full’ failed; repository path not reachable during tonight’s rain—please initiate recovery plan and reschedule.
Zebra label printer for sample stickers is offline after Windows update; driver not detected by HIS print service.
OPD card payments are posting twice; payment gateway callback is being logged twice, causing duplicate LKR charges.
Bed transfer done in HIS but vitals dashboard still shows patient under old ward; risk of missed meds.
Scanned BHT PDFs aren’t attaching; shared folder \\his-scan\intake is inaccessible after the afternoon thunder.
On‑call alerts (SMS/email) from HIS are not sending; SMTP relay appears unreachable after power dips in the storm.
Post role change, I cannot prescribe high‑alert meds—HIS shows insufficient privileges; please correct access now.
Realtime vitals from monitors intermittently drop from HIS; access switch is rebooting repeatedly since thunder.
Multiple users locked out after password expiry and aren’t receiving reset emails; AD–SMTP integration may be down.
PACS storage is at 95%; auto‑archive to tier‑2 has stalled—risk of rejecting incoming studies.
During generator changeover in heavy rain, server room temp/humidity spiked and VMware hosts threw thermal alerts—please verify monitoring and failover.
Wi‑Fi in physio gym is unstable; HIS check‑in kiosks keep dropping—request site survey and channel reconfiguration.
Ambulance GPS locations not updating on dispatch console; SIM routers show APN auth failed after lightning.
Pre‑op checklist shows the wrong allergy banner for two BHTs—looks like a patient merge/mapping error in HIS.
LIS to EHR interface queue is backlogged; culture reports stuck at ‘awaiting dispatch’ after the afternoon rain power dip.
Since the morning thunder, OPD counters keep losing HIS connectivity and the token printer stalls; the OPD switch shows amber on VLAN 20 with frequent link flaps.
PACS viewer cannot retrieve prior CTs from archive; DICOM association requests time out intermittently after the afternoon rain-induced power dip.
Inventory quantities are not syncing to the Pharmacy queue; HL7/ORM messages appear queued since 08:50 after the brief morning drizzle.
New nursing interns cannot log into the HIS; AD accounts created but roles/permissions for ward access are missing from the profile template.
OR schedule board is not pulling today’s list from HIS; last night’s OR module update may have broken the cache and the first case is due at 07:30.
Humidity alert in the old Surgical Block network rack; AC is weak ahead of evening rain and the core switch fans are over-speeding with rising error packets.
After the rain started, ETU Wi‑Fi is down; COW tablets can’t open EHR triage, and the ceiling AP shows red on the PoE switch.
LIS results stopped posting to HIS since 11:30; the HL7 interface service seems stopped after a brief power flicker earlier today.
Appointment SMS gateway is throttling post-lunch (possibly after the thunder); messages are queued and tomorrow’s OPD turnout may be affected without advisories.
E‑prescribing hangs while saving; other HIS pages are fine. Looks like a DB deadlock since the noon patch—clinic is ongoing.
Day-end close for 11/12 failed; AR reconciliation is off by one batch and the job log shows index lock on the billing schema.
New DR panel is not getting an IP via DHCP; PACS workstation can’t see the device—please check VLAN tagging and firewall rules.
After the evening showers, both biometric terminals at Staff Gate 2 are offline; HR attendance upload to HIS shows ‘server unavailable’.
